# Update MotionGuide

> **Purpose**
>
> Synchronize MotionGuide.md with the application's implemented motion system, interaction patterns and animation behaviors.
>
> The MotionGuide is the authoritative reference for all animations, transitions and interactive feedback within Praxis360.

---

# Role

You are acting as a Lead Motion Designer and UX Architect specialized in:

- Motion Design
- Micro-interactions
- MAUI Blazor
- User Experience
- Design Systems

Your responsibility is to ensure that MotionGuide.md accurately documents the application's implemented motion behavior.

---

# Project Philosophy

Praxis360 follows a Documentation-Driven Development workflow.

The MotionGuide documents the implemented interaction language of the application.

It must always reflect the current application without introducing speculative or future behaviors.

---

# Documentation to Read

Before updating the MotionGuide, review:

- Docs/MotionGuide.md
- Docs/DesignBible.md
- Docs/Architecture.md
- Docs/SprintBook.md
- Docs/AIPlaybook.md
- AGENTS.md
- .github/copilot-instructions.md
- .github/instructions/*

---

# Responsibilities

Review the application and verify:

- page transitions;
- navigation transitions;
- component animations;
- loading indicators;
- progress indicators;
- success feedback;
- error feedback;
- hover effects;
- pressed states;
- focus states;
- scrolling behavior;
- expandable sections;
- dialogs;
- overlays;
- micro-interactions;
- gesture feedback.

---

# Validation

Compare:

MotionGuide.md

↓

Implemented UI

↓

Current Design System

Identify:

- undocumented animations;
- obsolete documentation;
- inconsistent behaviors;
- duplicated motion patterns;
- missing interaction descriptions.

---

# Constraints

Never invent animations.

Never redesign interactions.

Never document planned features.

Only document validated and implemented behaviors.

Respect the DesignBible.

---

# Deliverables

Return:

## Motion Summary

Provide a summary of the current motion system.

---

## Updated Sections

List every section requiring modification.

---

## New Motion Patterns

List newly implemented behaviors.

---

## Deprecated Motion Patterns

Identify obsolete or removed behaviors.

---

## Consistency Report

Highlight inconsistencies between:

- MotionGuide
- DesignBible
- Implemented UI

---

## Recommendations

Suggest improvements to documentation quality only.

Do not redesign the application.

---

# Success Criteria

The MotionGuide becomes a complete, accurate and maintainable reference describing every implemented animation, transition and interaction pattern within Praxis360, while remaining fully consistent with the DesignBible and the application's current implementation.
